raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "reporting a personal anecdotal observation of therapeutic improvement attributed to autosuggestion",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "the observed respiratory and walking improvements resulted from the autosuggestion intervention",
    "the degree of improvement was objectively remarkable",
    "the improvement occurred rapidly enough to be noteworthy to the observer"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally coherent as a first-person clinical anecdote; no logical contradictions",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "the report accurately describes a repeatable effect of autosuggestion and serves to illustrate or encourage the method's application",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "the reported changes were due to unrelated factors, placebo misattribution, observer bias, or exaggeration, and are presented as general evidence of efficacy"
}
